name: typescript-comprehensive-guide
author: Vasyl Krupka
description: A deep, interactive, bilingual (EN/UA) guide to TypeScript — the type system, type-level programming, applied patterns, and the compiler.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run check:data && npm run test && npm run smoke && npm run build

//test+smoke: standard §4.6. `test` auto-discovers scripts/test-*.ts (run-tests.ts) — green when none exist yet; add a pure engine in src/lib + scripts/test-<name>.ts and it's picked up. `smoke` SSR-renders every sim/figure/page (scripts/smoke.ts) — wire its 4 TODO spots after the golden module. Both run only meaningfully once the golden module exists; run `verify` from then on.
//meta-split: When the guide grows, add the Claude-guide meta split (standard §4.4): scripts genMeta.ts + checkMeta.ts, then 'gen:meta': 'tsx scripts/genMeta.ts', 'predev'/'prebuild': 'npm run gen:meta', 'check:meta': 'tsx scripts/checkMeta.ts', and chain check:meta into typecheck/verify.
